title: DAY 11 — CRM-M8 — RMA REPAIR & WARRANTY (DAY 2 OF 2)

questions.question: In the Standard Repair Pickup notification message, within what time frame does the SOP state the pickup will be attempted?

options.text: Within 12–24 hours
Within 24–48 hours (if serviceable)
Within 48–72 hours
Within 2–3 business days

questions.question: According to the Standard Repair Pickup notification script, what is the stated timeline for the entire repair process end-to-end?

options.text: 5–7 business days
7–10 business days
10–15 business days
15–20 business days

questions.question: In the Self-Ship notification script, what is the correct sequence of events communicated to the customer after the product reaches the warehouse?

options.text: Quality check → repair → payment link → dispatch
Payment link (if charges apply) → repair → quality check → ship back
Repair → payment link → quality check → ship back
Payment link → quality check → repair → ship back

questions.question: At which point in the RMA procedure is the customer notification message (Step 9) sent?

options.text: Immediately after the customer confirms they want to proceed (Step 5)
Immediately after FIMS submission but before sharing the RMA number
After the RMA number has been shared on WhatsApp (Step 8), before the RMA sheet update
After the RMA sheet has been updated (Step 10)

questions.question: The Self-Ship notification script differs from the Standard Repair Pickup script in one critical way regarding timelines. What is that difference?

options.text: Self-Ship promises a faster turnaround of 5–7 business days
Self-Ship includes a specific pickup timeline of 24–48 hours
Self-Ship does not commit to any specific timeline — only describes the process sequence
Self-Ship guarantees delivery within 10 business days of warehouse receipt

questions.question: What is the correct FIMS path to detect a pickup exception for an RMA order?

options.text: OMS → Shopify → Returns → Pickup Exception
OMS → RMA → Create → Exception Log
OMS → RMA → Orders → Pickup Pending / Pickup Exception → View Order
OMS → Returns → Pickup Exception → View Details

questions.question: A pickup is marked as "Cancelled" by the courier with the reason "customer not available." Before taking any action, what must the executive do first?

options.text: Reassign the pickup immediately from the FIMS panel to avoid further delay
Escalate to CRM Asst Manager via `after-sale-services` Slack
Call the customer to verify whether they cancelled the pickup and whether it was actually attempted
Update the Pickup Exception tab with the courier's stated reason and mark the action as "Reassign"

questions.question: What is the maximum number of pickup attempts allowed for an RMA order before the customer is asked to self-ship?

options.text: 2 attempts
3 attempts
4 attempts
5 attempts

questions.question: After 3 failed pickup attempts, the customer is informed to self-ship. Within what time period must the customer self-ship the product?

options.text: Within 2 weeks
Within 1 month
Within 7 business days
No time limit — the customer may ship when ready

questions.question: A customer refuses to self-ship after 3 failed pickup attempts. The order is an RMA order (not a Shopify return). What is the correct action?

options.text: Cancel the RMA in FIMS immediately and update the Pickup Exception tab
Escalate to CRM Asst Manager via `after-sale-services` Slack before cancelling, then cancel RMA in FIMS
Continue reassigning pickups beyond the 3-attempt limit until the customer agrees
Convert the RMA order to a Shopify Return for easier cancellation

questions.question: A customer refuses to self-ship and the order is a Shopify Return (not RMA). What is cancelled in FIMS?

options.text: The RMA request
The Shopify order entirely
The Return in FIMS
Both the RMA and the Return

questions.question: What are the 4 fields that must be updated in the Pickup Exception tab after handling a pickup exception?

options.text: Agent, Date, Order ID, Action Taken
Order ID, Tracking ID, Reason for Exception, Action Taken
Order ID, RMA ID, Customer Name, Pickup Date
Tracking ID, Courier Name, Reason, Reassignment Date

questions.question: What are the valid "Action Taken" entries in the Pickup Exception tab?

options.text: Reassign / Self-ship / Cancelled
Retry / Ship / Close
Reassign / Escalate / Cancel
Pending / Resolved / Cancelled

questions.question: Before raising a Re-RMA request, which tab must the executive check first to verify previous RMA history for the same order?

options.text: Daily Work - CRM-2026 → RMA tab → filter by Order ID
Re RMA Report → Repeated Rma tab
FIMS → OMS → RMA → Orders → search by Order ID
Daily Work - CRM-2026 → Pickup Exception tab

questions.question: When creating a Re-RMA in the RMA sheet, what two entries differentiate it from a standard RMA?

options.text: Re-RMA = Yes in the Re-RMA column; previous RMA ID entered in the Comment column
Re-RMA = Repeat in the Re-RMA column; previous Order ID in the Agent column
Re-RMA = Yes in the Re-RMA column; "REPEAT" entered in the Order Status column
Re-RMA = 2 (indicating second attempt) in the Re-RMA column; no Comment needed

questions.question: A customer is submitting their 3rd RMA for the same product. At what point must the executive escalate, and to whom?

options.text: After creating the RMA in FIMS → escalate to CRM Manager via `customer-care` Slack
Before creating the Re-RMA → escalate to CRM Asst Manager via `after-sale-services` Slack
After the product arrives at the warehouse → escalate to CRM Asst Manager via email
No escalation required — the 3-attempt rule applies only to pickup exceptions, not Re-RMA

questions.question: A customer disputes the warranty coverage determination — they insist the issue is covered when it is not. What is the correct escalation?

options.text: Decline the customer's claim and proceed with the chargeable repair estimate
Escalate to CRM Asst Manager via `after-sale-services` Slack before declining
Escalate to CRM Manager via `customer-care` Slack after informing the customer
Transfer the call to a Senior Executive for a second opinion

questions.question: A customer disputes the repair cost estimate and wants to cancel. What must happen before the RMA is cancelled in FIMS?

options.text: The executive can cancel immediately — customer consent to cancel is sufficient
Escalate to CRM Asst Manager via `after-sale-services` Slack before cancelling the RMA
Inform the customer the cost is non-negotiable and close the ticket
Transfer to CRM Manager for a final cost review

questions.question: Which of the following is a common mistake identified in the SOP?

options.text: Sharing the RMA number on WhatsApp before the customer confirms they want to proceed
Proceeding to FIMS without the customer's written approval for chargeable repair
Asking the customer for a video before acknowledging their concern
Entering "12" in the warranty period field when it is empty

questions.question: The SOP lists 6 common mistakes. Which of the following correctly identifies THREE of them?

options.text: Not uploading the customer video in FIMS; leaving the warranty period field blank; not sharing the RMA number on WhatsApp after submission
Committing to free repair before verifying warranty coverage; entering the wrong Repair Status value; not checking the Re RMA Report
Not updating the RMA sheet after generating the request; entering the wrong pickup type; skipping the address verification step
Skipping the QC image upload; not escalating after 2 failed pickups; using verbal instead of written approval
